summary: Color-graded video set to music with narration. A worn U.S. flag on a pole against an overcast sky (caption 'RIGHTFUL PLACE'), a B-2 bomber flanked by fighter jets in formation (caption 'AND ADMIRATION'), and a tracking shot of Trump walking through a steel mill flanked by rows of workers in hard hats (caption 'THE FUTURE IS OURS'). Narration: 'America will reclaim its rightful place as the greatest, most powerful nation on Earth... the future's ours.'

script.scene: Desaturated shot of a worn U.S. flag on a pole against an overcast sky; caption 'RIGHTFUL PLACE'; narration: 'America will reclaim its rightful place...'
Low-angle shot of a B-2 bomber flanked by fighter jets flying in formation; caption 'AND ADMIRATION'; narration: '...the admiration of the entire world.'
Tracking shot of Trump walking through a steel mill (large steel coils) flanked by rows of workers in hard hats; caption 'THE FUTURE IS OURS.'
Continued footage of workers in the mill; narration: 'nothing will stand in our way because we are Americans...'
Final frame with the music at its peak; narration: '...the future's ours.'

notable_text: RIGHTFUL PLACE; AND ADMIRATION; THE FUTURE IS OURS; (VO) America will reclaim its rightful place as the greatest, most powerful nation on Earth; (tweet) The Future is Ours, American.
